description: Create a 10mm thick extrusion of a connecting rod profile. The sketch must feature a left outer arc (radius 20mm) centered at (0,0) and a right outer arc (radius 15mm) centered at (100,0), joined by tangent lines. Include concentric inner holes at (0,0) with a 20mm diameter and at (100,0) with a 15mm diameter. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/connecting_rod.slvs and export the STL to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/connecting_rod.stl.
